chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 213 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1068/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2025 Mr. Manzar Hussain Memon, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector, SAPT. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent, which is taken on record. He points out page 31 of the file, which demonstrates that request for provisional release has already been made to the department per Section 83(B) of the Customs Act, 1969. The receipts stamp of the said application is 17.01.2025 whereas present petition has been filed on 18.01.2025. in view hereof, no case is made out for concurrent proceedings for grant of such relief, hence the petition is dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
